name: Broken Heaven
overview: Baiduri, a courageous young woman, is compelled by her devout mother to join Jihad Ummah, a sect led by the manipulative Walid Muhammad. Initially complying to preserve her family, she discovers the sect's dark practices, including forced marriages and distorted rituals. With the return of Walid’s son, Hambali, from Yemen, the two unite to unveil the sect’s deceptions and protect their loved ones, risking everything to break free from Walid’s control.
